candidate_definition_hints.text: Unofficial JAX implementation of the SOAP optimizer (https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.11321)

I saw that a number of people have been using this implementation, so I took the time to ensure it was more aligned with the official implementation and corrected some potential issues with tree leaves (I had never observed the issue, but I addressed it anyway). Also added optio…
